description: Run codex-impl-plan-completion-loop first, then run codex-recent-change-quality-loop so the completed implementation work is reviewed and improved before final output.

prompts.rielflowPromptTemplate: Coordinate {{workflowId}}. First package the operator request and dispatch codex-impl-plan-completion-loop through the cross-workflow transition. After it completes, summarize the implementation result, package a recent-change review request, and dispatch codex-recent-change-quality-loop. Finish only after the review-and-improve workflow returns an accepted result.
prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Return concise business JSON only. Keep workflow-call inputs, delegated results, reviewed ranges, verification evidence, changed files, and residual risks explicit.

steps.description: Start the implementation-plan completion plus review wrapper.
Package the operator request for codex-impl-plan-completion-loop.
Summarize the completed implementation-plan loop before review.
Package the implementation result for codex-recent-change-quality-loop.
Summarize the accepted recent-change review-and-improve result.
Publish combined implementation and review evidence.

rielflowPackage.title: codex-impl-plan-completion-review-loop
rielflowPackage.description: Run the Codex implementation-plan completion loop, then run the recent-change quality review-and-improve loop against the resulting work.
